---
title:
  "Moloch: A Minimalist, Feature-Rich Beamer Theme"
author:
  - Johan Larsson
  - samcarter
abstract: >
  Moloch is a fork of the popular, but unmaintained, LaTeX Beamer theme
  Metropolis. It fixes outstanding  issues in Metropolis while preserving the
  original minimalist design. In this article we introduce Moloch’s features
  and options, provide guidance for Metropolis users transitioning to Moloch,
  and describe the documentation system that we use to generate both PDF and
  HTML documentation.
date: 2026-05-05
citation:
  author:
    - family: Larsson
      given: Johan
    - given: samcarter
  issued: 2026-05-05
  container-title: TUGboat
  volume: 47
  issue: 145
  page: 67-74
  issn: 0896-3207
  title:
    "Moloch: A Minimalist, Feature-Rich Beamer Theme"
  type: article-journal
  URL: https://tug.org/TUGboat/tb47-1/tb145larsson-moloch.html
  doi: 10.47397/tb/47-1/tb145larsson-moloch
url: https://tug.org/TUGboat/tb47-1/tb145larsson-moloch.html
github: jolars/moloch
ctan: moloch
doi: 10.47397/tb/47-1/tb145larsson-moloch
categories:
  - LaTeX
  - Beamer
  - Moloch
  - Presentations
---
